scopeSync.summary: Scoped active work to 영역 06 squad player card UX: PlayerAbilityPanel glass surfaces, PlayerOvrStyleCard/trait/profile input glass styling, HexagonRadar SVG token colors, --viz-grid light/dark values, and accessibility labels.

targetedTest.summary: 70 tests passed, including player ability glass panel/card classes, playstyle trait class, HexagonRadar max width, and detailed aria-label values.

lint.summary: ESLint passed as part of baseline verification.

typecheck.summary: TypeScript passed for PlayerAbilityPanel, HexagonRadar, globals CSS contract, and UI test changes.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 230 tests passed, 15 skipped.

build.summary: Production build passed with build-time public Supabase env.

retrospective.issuesObserved: The active MyPage path used surface=flat, so only changing the card surface branch would not prove the player card UX in the visible profile path.
retrospective.missedEvidence: Manual light/dark visual comparison for radar grid contrast and blur strength was not run; deterministic tests cover class contracts and the aria-label fallback.
retrospective.harnessImprovementProposal: Consider a focused PlayerAbilityPanel visual fixture covering card and flat surfaces to reduce reliance on MyPage integration rendering.
retrospective.reason: The squad player card changes are section-specific UI styling and accessibility work covered by deterministic tests; no durable harness rule promotion is needed.
